name: HEVC Attempt to Shrink Big Files
description: HEVC Attempt to Shrink Big Files

flowPlugins.name: An error occurred during transcoding. Passing file to flow that normalizes and corrects common transcoding issues.
Track if Conformity has already occurred
Conform Step has already occurred. Failing flow to prevent infinite loop.
File is the same size or larger than the input file. Keeping original.
File is smaller! Keeping working file.
File is HEVC, AV1, or VP9, and is an acceptable resolution and bitrate. Keeping.
Checking Library and Notifying relevant programs
Video is an older, less space efficient video codec. Initiating ffmpeg command with aggressive compression settings.
Video is High Resolution (1440p+). HDR/10-bit colour preserved, encoding as 10-bit HEVC_NVENC.
Video is 1080p. Checking the video bitrate.
Video is 1080p with a high bitrate. Transcoding to lower bitrate using slightly less aggressive settings.
File is not MKV. Running through conform steps before transcoding.
No processing has happened, let's wait to give Tdarr_Server time to breathe.
Check if Conform has Happened During this flow
Conform has already happened. Continuing without waiting.
Rules 0-1/18: Delete Junk, Font & Sidecar Image Files
Rules 2-4/11/13/14: Filter Streams, UTF-8 Subs, Dispositions
Rule 9: Skip if Bitrate < 1.5 Mbps (already small)
Route to Sonarr / Radarr / Skip (by DB ID)
sub-720p: Skip if HEVC/AV1/VP9 < 4 Mbps, else encode
Video is sub-720p with non-efficient codec. Encoding to HEVC.
